The '''Great Droid Revolution''', also known as the '''Great Droid Revolt''', was an uprising of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] which occurred in [[4015 BBY]]. It was during the Revolution where [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]] learned the [[Ionize|technique]] of short-circuiting a droid by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. One of the memorable instances of the Revolution was when [[Juggernaut war droid]]s battled [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] over [[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]].

After the rogue assassin droid [[HK-01]] was finally captured, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spent many years recovering from the attacks. Droid designers and manufacturers then turned to weapons developers to work on ion weapons that would short-circuit a droid's electronic systems. The result of this conflict would be an [[Anti-droid sentiment/Legends|end]] to the budding [[Droid rights/Legends|"droids' rights" movement]] for a time.

These events were later chronicled in the book ''[[Conflagration: An Eyewitness Account of the Great Droid Uprising]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' mistakenly establishes the droid uprising as happening during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="KotORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
